title: stevia cuzcoensis
intro: Stevia cuzcoensis, also known as "sweet leaf," is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family, native to the Andean region of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antibacterial agent. Stevia cuzcoensis is also known for its potential health benefits, such as lowering blood sugar levels, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in weight management. Stevia preparations can be found in herbal supplements, teas, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
